mapper.select:
SELECT ID TSPT_ID TRUST_ID SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID PORT_NAME TRUST_NO SCN SHIP_VOYAGE_NAME PACKING_NAME TRADE_TYPE CARGO_CODE CARGO_NAME OUTWARD_TYPE_NAME DEPT_ID DEPT_NAME TON KC_STATUS DD_STATUS WF_STATUS CREATE_BY CREATE_BY_NAME CREATE_TIME UPDATE_BY UPDATE_BY_NAME UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_DY_SUM
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_DY_SUM(ID, TSPT_ID, TRUST_ID, SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID, PORT_NAME, TRUST_NO, SCN, SHIP_VOYAGE_NAME, PACKING_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, CARGO_CODE, OUTWARD_TYPE, OUTWARD_TYPE_NAME, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, TON, KC_STATUS, DD_STATUS, WF_STATUS, HR_STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tsptId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipVoyageItemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipVoyageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packingName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outwardType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outwardTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ton, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{kcStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ddStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wfStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hrStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_DY_SUM SET TSPT_ID = #{tsptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipVoyageItemId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PORT_NAME = #{portName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRUST_NO = #{trustNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SCN = #{scn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIP_VOYAGE_NAME = #{shipVoyageName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PACKING_NAME = #{packingName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OUTWARD_TYPE = #{outwardType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OUTWARD_TYPE_NAME = #{outwardTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TON = #{ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, KC_STATUS = #{kcStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DD_STATUS = #{ddStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WF_STATUS = #{wfStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HR_STATUS = #{hrStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
